case_title: IMAGE SOURCE INC. DBA BLUEBIRD OFFICE SUPPLIES VS. LUCAS MAGENO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2007 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMAGE SOURCE INC. DBA BLUEBIRD OFFICE SUPPLIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAGENO, LUCAS CAPITOL REPROGRAPHICS LLC $2,988.45 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,038.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
